name: io.github.starecz/karea-mcp
description: Karea task manager MCP server - 44 tools so Claude Code, Cursor, and other MCP clients can create, edit, close, and recap your dev tasks while you code.

environmentVariables.name: KAREA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Karea API key. Generate at https://karea.app/dashboard/settings/api-keys

environmentVariables.name: KAREA_URL
environmentVariables.description: Karea base URL. Defaults to https://karea.app for the hosted service.
